description_long: This is a rectangular milk carton with a predominantly blue and white color scheme. The front face features the word 'MILK' in bold white letters, accompanied by a playful cow illustration and the phrase 'PACKAGING ONLY' below. The top of the carton is flat with a blue screw cap located on one side, and the upper corners are folded in a typical tetra pak style. Decorative white splashes and the text '100% MILK' are visible on the upper section, enhancing the dairy theme. The carton appears to be made of laminated cardboard or paperboard, commonly used for liquid packaging, and is fully opaque with no visible contents.
description: A blue and white rectangular milk carton with a blue screw cap, bold 'MILK' text, and a cartoon cow illustration on the front. The carton is opaque and made of laminated paperboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'MILK' label, cow illustration, and blue cap on the top right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the blue cap and the folded top corners, with partial visibility of the front and side graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal labeling, showing the blue cap on the top left and a plain blue and white design.
description_view_3: Angled rear view, similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the cap and folded top.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front face displays 'MILK' in large white letters, '100% MILK' in a small white circle, and a cartoon cow with 'PACKAGING ONLY' below. All text and graphics are in white or black on a blue background.
